---
title: "*Disrupting Philanthropy?* published in *Journal of Philanthropy*"
date: "2026-03-01"
categories: [publication]
---

Our article ["Disrupting Philanthropy? A Reality Check for Digital Crowdfunding"](https://doi.org/10.1002/nvsm.70041), with Nora Kenworthy, Erik Schneiderhan, and Jeremy Snyder, is out in the *Journal of Philanthropy*.
